heas_scenario.enforcement_mechanism: metrics_episode() is the Layer API contract. EA objective, tournament scorer, and CI analysis all read the same dict. Adding/changing a metric in metrics_episode() propagates to all consumers automatically.

interpretation: Mesa's DataCollector is a logging tool with no enforcement of metric consistency across consumers. HEAS's metric contract is a compositional interface that guarantees EA, tournament, and statistics always see the same values. This is not a Mesa 'bug' — it is a structural property of pull-based logging vs contract-based composition.
